division: Division of Oil and Gas Resources Management (DOGRM)
notes: ODNR is the O&G regulator + runs the state Orphan Well Program (IIJA-funded). Well status field WELL_STATUS_DESCRIPTION in the OH GIS.

agency: Pennsylvania Department of Environmental Protection (PA DEP)
division: Office of Oil and Gas Management
program_name: Orphan and Abandoned Well Plugging Program
notes: PA DEP runs the plugging program; PASDA 1088 is the live well registry. IIJA-funded plugging active.

agency: West Virginia Department of Environmental Protection (WVDEP)
notes: WVDEP Office of Oil and Gas is the regulator; tagis.dep.wv.gov hosts the well GIS (layer 4 = plugged).
KGS publishes the well dataset (kyog_dd.zip); Division of Oil and Gas administers plugging; State Bid Well Program referenced in HANDOFF.
